title: Network connection reset

Resolution:Check latency, retry failed operation, validate downstream dependency health.

title: HDFS block replication issue
text:
Incident ID:RAW-INC-2997
Service:hdfs-namenode
Severity:P1
Alert:HDFS block replication issue
Logs:081109 203522 ERROR dfs.FSNamesystem: Under replicated block blk_38865049064139660 target=3 found=1
Metrics:latency_p95=2200ms
Root Cause:Insufficient HDFS block replicas
Resolution:Check DataNode health, trigger block re-replication, validate NameNode block reports.

title: High latency detected
text:
Incident ID:SYN-INC-0001
Service:auth-service
Severity:P2
Alert:High latency detected
Logs:auth-service: timeout while calling downstream service
Metrics:cpu=92%,memory=78%
Root Cause:Downstream dependency latency spike
Resolution:Check downstream latency, scale service, restart unhealthy pods.

title: Pod restart loop
text:
Incident ID:SYN-INC-0002
Service:cart-service
Severity:P3
Alert:Pod restart loop
Logs:cart-service: CrashLoopBackOff; OOMKilled; memory limit exceeded
Metrics:consumer_lag=18000
Root Cause:Pod memory exhaustion
Resolution:Increase memory limit, capture heap dump, rollback if required.

title: Pod restart loop

title: Queue backlog increasing

Severity:P2

Resolution:Scale consumers and check downstream API latency.

title: Bgl Node Failure Runbook
text:
# BGL Node Failure Runbook
Symptoms: node not responding, machine check interrupt, kernel fatal events.
Investigation: identify affected node, check kernel logs, drain workload.
Remediation: restart node if safe, isolate faulty node, escalate to hardware team.

title: Database Connection Runbook
text:
# Database Connection Runbook
Symptoms: connection pool exhausted, JDBC timeout, slow queries.
Investigation: check active DB connections, slow queries, pool config, DB CPU.
Remediation: increase pool temporarily, kill stale sessions, optimize slow queries.

title: Hdfs Replication Runbook
text:
# HDFS Replication Runbook
Symptoms: under replicated blocks, DataNode failures, replication timeout.
Investigation: check DataNode health, NameNode block report, disk availability, network between nodes.
Remediation: restart unhealthy DataNode after approval, trigger block re-replication, replace failed disk or node.

title: High Latency Runbook
text:
# High Latency Runbook
Symptoms: p95 latency spike, timeout errors, downstream failures.
Investigation: check CPU, memory, dependency latency, recent deployment.
Remediation: scale service, restart unhealthy pods, rollback if issue started after release.

title: Kafka Consumer Lag Runbook
text:
# Kafka Consumer Lag Runbook
Symptoms: consumer lag, queue backlog, message delay.
Investigation: check replicas, partitions, downstream service latency.
Remediation: scale consumers, rebalance partitions, fix downstream bottleneck.
